summary: A high-spec contemporary bathroom presented in very good overall decorative order, with extensive glossy tiling, mirrored surfaces and integrated sanitaryware. The room appears generally clean and well maintained, with only light marks visible on a few reflective/white surfaces and minor limescale or water spotting on some chrome and glass elements. Overall condition is good to excellent, with no obvious structural damage visible in the supplied photos.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth white painted ceiling with recessed downlights and a circular ceiling-mounted extract vent.
defects: minor marks/spotting visible around recessed fittings at high level

items.name: Walls
items.description: Large-format glossy light grey wall tiles with dark marble-effect feature tiling to selected sections.
defects: light water spotting/reflection marks visible on glossy tile surfaces at eye level
minor grout line discolouration visible in places on close inspection

items.name: Flooring
items.description: Dark marble-effect polished tiled flooring.
defects: light cleaning marks and reflected water spotting visible on polished surface

items.name: Door
items.description: White painted internal door with black lever handle and round thumb turn/lock furniture.
defects: light surface marking visible on door face at eye level

items.name: Door frame and architrave
items.description: White painted door frame and architrave to bathroom entrance.
defects: minor wear/marks visible at lower edges

items.name: Threshold strip
items.description: Metal threshold strip at the bathroom entrance.

items.name: Skirting boards
items.description: White painted skirting boards visible to the doorway and perimeter areas.

items.name: Bath panel
items.description: White bath front panel surrounding a built-in bathtub, with a glazed bath screen to the front edge.
defects: light smudging and water spotting visible on the bath panel surface

items.name: Built-in bathtub
items.description: White rectangular built-in bath with chrome waste and overflow fittings.
defects: light water marks visible within bath interior

items.name: Bath screen
items.description: Clear glass bath shower screen with chrome/black fittings.
defects: water spotting visible on glass at eye level
minor limescale/marking visible on lower seal/edge

items.name: Wall-mounted vanity unit
items.description: Floating white vanity unit with integrated rectangular basin and mirrored/reflective wall front above, with open lower shelf detail visible in the mirror cabinet area.
defects: light marks and water spotting visible on white surfaces at chest level

items.name: Integrated wash basin
items.description: White rectangular integrated basin with single tap hole and chrome mixer tap set into the vanity unit.
defects: light water marks visible around bowl and rim

items.name: Mirror fronted bathroom cabinet
items.description: Large mirrored cabinet/reflective storage front above the basin, flush-mounted to wall.
defects: light spotting/smudging visible on mirrored surface

items.name: Wall cabinet
items.description: Tall wall-mounted storage cabinet with light wood-effect interior shelving and mirrored outer surfaces.

items.name: Open shelving
items.description: Built-in light wood-effect shelving within cabinet, including multiple horizontal shelves.

items.name: Illuminated vanity mirror
items.description: Circular illuminated mirror/light feature mounted within the cabinet area.

items.name: Toilet
items.description: White close-coupled toilet with soft-close style seat/lid, chrome flush control plate and adjacent toilet brush set.
defects: light water marks visible in the pan and on the seat surface

items.name: Toilet brush and holder
items.description: Black toilet brush with round metallic/silver-lidded holder.

items.name: Flush plate
items.description: Square chrome concealed cistern flush plate.
defects: light water spotting visible on polished surface

items.name: Towel radiator
items.description: Chrome ladder-style heated towel rail mounted to the wall.

items.name: Wall-mounted shower rail and hand shower
items.description: Chrome adjustable shower rail with handheld shower head and flexible hose.
defects: light limescale/water spotting visible on chrome shower head and hose

items.name: Bath filler/mixer set
items.description: Chrome bath mixer taps and overflow filler arrangement above the bathtub.
defects: light water spotting visible on chrome fittings

items.name: Wall-mounted control plates
items.description: Two chrome control knobs/plates set into tiled wall above the bath, likely bath/shower controls.
defects: light spotting visible on polished chrome surfaces

items.name: Shower tray area
items.description: Integrated showering area over the bath with fixed and handheld shower fittings.

items.name: Recessed ceiling downlights
items.description: Recessed white LED downlights to the ceiling.

items.name: Ceiling extractor vent
items.description: Circular white ceiling-mounted extractor vent.

items.name: Wall light strip
items.description: Continuous linear LED light strip running along the wall/ceiling junction above the tiled wall.

items.name: Thermostat/control panel
items.description: Small wall-mounted digital/analogue control panel within the cabinet niche.

items.name: Double socket outlet
items.description: White double electrical socket mounted within the cabinet niche.

items.name: Small wall control plate
items.description: Small square wall-mounted control/switch plate within the cabinet niche.

items.name: Toilet brush mat/side accessory
items.description: Small purple packet/box-like item on floor beside toilet; appears to be packaging or a disposable item rather than permanent fitting.

items.name: Bath mat
items.description: Black and white checkerboard bath mat on floor in front of bath.
defects: slight flattening/wear visible to pile in centre

items.name: Glass shelf/counter item
items.description: Small square pale green glass-like item with dark edge detail near the bath; likely a scale or cover plate visible on the floor area.
